description: Strategy R&D run log for stock-oracle historical replay. Each entry records a focus, candidates tried, per-variant metrics, the winner verdict, and any news rule proposal. Append-only; preserve prior entries.

runs.focus: Low-drawdown 'coil/squeeze' replacements for the catastrophic existing replay strategies. All 4 prior live strategies (momentum, volume_spike, composite, random) lose money and trail SPY; composite is the only one near median monkey but does so with a lottery-style -79% drawdown. Goal: a strategy that is positive, beats SPY (+52%), clears the p75 monkey, AND has a survivable drawdown.

candidatesTried.name: mega_liquid_bb_squeeze
candidatesTried.spec: Tightest 5d/20d range coil (compress = range_5d_pct/range_20d_pct) among $500M+ ADV uptrending (dist_sma20_pct>0) names; pick 1/day.

candidatesTried.name: squeeze_ultraliquid_750m
candidatesTried.spec: Same squeeze mechanic with a higher $750M ADV liquidity floor (robustness check on liquidity sensitivity).

candidatesTried.name: squeeze_breakout_confirmed
candidatesTried.spec: Squeeze ($500M) additionally requiring price near its 20d high (dist_high20_pct > -5) to confirm upward resolution.

candidatesTried.name: squeeze_spy_regime_gated
candidatesTried.spec: Candidate-1 squeeze gated to only trade when SPY > its own lagged 20d SMA (defensive market-regime overlay; SPY sourced from yfinance, +1d lag, look-ahead-safe).

candidatesTried.name: squeeze_volcontraction_combo
candidatesTried.spec: Squeeze ($500M) restricted to quiet/contracting volume (0.5 <= volume_ratio <= 1.2), pairing the coil with the volume_contraction signal.

candidatesTried.name: composite
candidatesTried.spec: Existing baseline strategy, re-run for apples-to-apples comparison in this window.

candidatesTried.name: random
candidatesTried.spec: Monkey-style random pick, harness wiring sanity check.

winner.name: squeeze_ultraliquid_750m (conditional / risk-adjusted)
winner.verdict: NO candidate beats the composite baseline on the literal blended metric (composite is higher on return AND Sharpe AND percentile). On a drawdown-aware/survivable-capital basis the squeeze family is the real win: squeeze_ultraliquid_750m has the best Sharpe (1.09) and win-rate (0.497) of the family with a -30% drawdown vs composite's account-ending -79%. squeeze_spy_regime_gated is the safest (maxDD -19.3%, ~SPY level) if drawdown is the hard constraint. Treat as a forward-test candidate, NOT applied live.
winner.overfitRisk: MEDIUM. n>=423 trades on all kept candidates (not noise), and 5 sibling variants moving coherently with parameters argues against a single lucky fit. But: single tested window (2024-01..2026-04) was a strong-tape AI bull market; no walk-forward/out-of-sample split; squeeze edge is leveraged to that regime. The gated variant's yfinance SPY dependency is a runtime fragility, not overfit.

newsRule.proposedRule: Two-part per-stock news gate in autoTrader.processSignals: (1) hard veto on dilution/offering/regulatory blocklist regex or avg 48h sentiment <= -0.4 over >=3 articles; (2) soft positive-catalyst boost relaxing the risk-off regime gate one notch when avg 24h sentiment >= +0.5 over >=3 articles. Market-wide getMarketNews() avg < -0.3 bumps minGemScore +5 for the cycle. All thresholds in autoTradeConfig.json defaulting OFF (ships dark).
newsRule.codeLocation: Producer: server/index.js scan loop (~L247-280); Consumer: server/services/autoTrader.js processSignals (~L254 after heldSymbols, before Claude gate; regime relaxation at ~L281-291).
newsRule.forwardTestPlan: Point-in-time news unavailable (archive is OHLCV-only; Finnhub/Google return today's headlines -> look-ahead leak). Telegram-only SHADOW for 4-6 weeks with newsBlockEnabled=false: log would-be decisions to server/data/newsShadow.json, join to resolved outcomes, promote BLOCK only if blocked-trade win-rate is materially below baseline over >=20 samples; promote BOOST only if boosted entries beat baseline over >=20 samples.
